textPlain: More photos of the former NeXT offices can be found in Stanford’s Douglas Menuez photography collection:https://exhibits.stanford.edu/menuez/browse/next-computer-in...
In picture 4 - is that an actual NeXT factory in Silicon Valley? I guess I knew that used to be a thing, but it's weird to see from today.
There's a promotional video of the NeXT factory.https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LhIwfu73reE
